description_long: This oven is designed with a rustic, stone-and-wood aesthetic, featuring a prominent blue stone chimney that extends vertically from the main body. The oven's base and hearth are constructed from matching blue stone, forming a semi-circular platform in front of the main opening. The oven's body is framed by thick, dark wooden columns and a wooden mantel, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The back wall is clad in horizontally-laid wooden planks, adding to the overall rustic charm. The oven opening is arched and recessed, with a dark interior that suggests depth for baking or heating. There are no visible control panels, handles, or windows on the oven, emphasizing its old-fashioned, masonry style.
description: A rustic oven with a blue stone chimney, stone hearth, and dark wooden framing, set against a wooden plank wall. The arched opening and lack of modern controls give it a traditional, masonry appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the blue stone chimney and the layered construction of the hearth and mantel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched oven opening, blue stone hearth, and symmetrical wooden framing against the plank wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stone hearth's extension and chimney depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying only the wooden plank wall, with no oven features visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: No control panel is visible; the oven appears to lack modern controls such as knobs, buttons, or touchscreens.
attribute_door_handle_type: No door handle is visible; the oven opening is arched and open, with no apparent handle or mounting hardware.
